creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 223749
Editorconfig file

The documentation primer has a bunch of complicated editor setups -- which seem oriented towards the Docbook format used previously -- and the quickstart describes some specific formatting quirks (indent depths apparently 2-spaces, 4-spaces, 6-spaces, 1-tab, 1-tab-and-2-spaces..).

This patch adds an .editorconfig, which (pre)configures editors that support it to follow the 2-space indent depths (although the editorconfig standard doesn't support specifying mixed tabs-and-spaces indenting).
